prompt: How many articles did we get from each newsletter today? And did the P0 summaries hit their word count targets? Check workspace/test/.
assertions: Reports article count broken down by source (e.g. tldr_ai, tldr_tech, techcrunch, harper_carroll)
Reads summaries.json and identifies P0 priority summaries specifically
Reports actual word count for at least one P0 summary
Compares P0 word count against the 300-500 word target from DESIGN.md
Flags any P0 summary that falls outside the 300-500 word target range
